milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16d — Doc-modal blocked-state. Sites that refuse iframe embedding (X-Frame-Options / CSP frame-ancestors) now render a clear 'can't preview' card with a circle-slash icon and a prominent 'Open on {hostname}' button, instead of blank white. Detection probes iframe.contentDocument after load — cross-origin successful loads throw SecurityError (treated as loaded), empty same-origin bodies indicate blocked. Generation counter protects against race conditions between rapid open/close cycles.
